name: claw-kanban
tagline: OpenClaw plugin — Kanban board, SEO, EDM, and Video Clip tools for your AI agent.
description: Claw Kanban provides a real-time, visual Kanban board to track the tasks your OpenClaw agent is working on. It also includes a powerful suite of SEO skills (Keyword Research, Competitor Analysis), EDM email marketing (Resend integration), and Video Clip processing (upload, transcribe, AI analysis, split into clips) — all synced to a cloud dashboard at teammate.work.
acknowledgements: Contains modified SEO & GEO skills originally created by Aaron Zhu at https://github.com/aaron-he-zhu/seo-geo-claude-skills
